sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 7.58 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.7)

statement.latex: Suppose that$F$is an absolutely free group,$R$a normal subgroup of$F$, and let${ V}$be a variety of groups. It is well-known (H.\,Neumann, Varieties of Groups, Springer, Berlin, 1967) that the group$F/{ V}(R)$is isomorphically embeddable in the${ V}$-verbal wreath product of a${ V}$-free group of the same rank as$F$with$F/R$. Find a criterion indicating which elements of this wreath product belong...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
